offer: For management consulting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of billing records and time tracking.
problem: Inaccurate billing reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for management consultants
Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to management consulting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for management consulting tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV imports for existing records
Streamline onboarding process for new users
